message:
test(frankenterm-core): add 18 flow-control policy property tests

Cover structural invariants of the backpressure decision engine:
- Determinism, Jain fairness bounds/symmetry, loss non-negativity
- Interactive events never dropped, hard-cap override → terminate
- Stable decision under low pressure, pause_pty_reads semantics
- Recovery budget constraints, replenish logic, action consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
